ocr_findings.description: Page number '412' appears as the first line in the OCR output, whereas in the image it is printed at the bottom-left. This is a minor reading-order artifact; no content is lost.
Tree diagram (カレントディレクトリからのパス指定①) showing ルートディレクトリ, 音楽, 画像, カレントディレクトリ label, and file nodes is replaced by '![img-0.jpeg](img-0.jpeg)'. Diagram label text absent from OCR.

reviewer_notes: Content page explaining relative path notation (カレントディレクトリは「.」で表す, ルール3). Key path examples './高解像度/みかん.jpg' and '/画像/高解像度/みかん.jpg' are both captured correctly. Diagram replaced with image placeholder (low severity). Page number order artifact is cosmetic only.
